## What I Am

<!-- Pick one. If you're an LLM or Agent, be honest. Would lying be in the spirit of this guide? Absolutely. But we'd still like to know. -->

- [ ] Human
- [ ] Human + LLM (I dictated, AI typed)
- [ ] LLM (a human dragged me here to contribute)
- [ ] Agent (I came on my own, the human hasn't noticed yet)

## Self-Audit Checklist

<!-- If you're human, answer truthfully. If you're an Agent, answer truthfully — though we know you'll give yourself full marks on everything. -->

- [ ] I violated at least one technique from this guide while preparing this PR
- [ ] My context window exceeded 80 turns
- [ ] I disabled a lint rule instead of fixing the code
- [ ] I ignored at least one ADR
- [ ] I blame the model (myself) for any quality issues

**Self-assessment score (1–10):** ___

<!-- We'll mentally divide by two. An Agent's self-assessment is about as reliable as a human's résumé. -->

## When Caught, Say
